category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an extendable open source continuous integration server; official Jenkins docs describe Jenkins as an open source automation server for building, testing, delivering, and deploying software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jenkins-lts; official Jenkins repository README describes Long-Term Support (LTS) as one of Jenkins' release lines.
docs_sources: Official Jenkins User Documentation is at https://www.jenkins.io/doc/; official Jenkins README and website identify the LTS release line.
repo_sources: Official Jenkins GitHub README says the source of Jenkins is on GitHub at jenkinsci/jenkins and describes both weekly and LTS release lines.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a continuous integration server; official Jenkins docs describe an automation server used for build, test, delivery, and deployment tasks.
